emails.subject: Re: missing deal
emails.body: Re: missing deal Mike said to just enter a new deal with these terms deal is 539032, and I've backdated the trade date to 3/1. emails.subject: missing deal
emails.body: missing deal Our contact at EES is looking for a deal between Mike and Jubran at NP15 for $124.00 She thinks the deal date should be 3/1 and we are buying calendar year 2002. I don't see anything in the system that looks like this. Can you check with Mike. Thanks!
